> Updated every 4 hours. Links to original sources.

### New FROST Attack Lets Websites Track What Sites and Apps You Open via SSD Timing

- URL: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/new-frost-attack-lets-websites-track.html
- Summary: A malicious website can work out which sites you visit and which apps you open, using nothing but JavaScript and the timing of your SSD. The attack, called FROST, needs no native code, no extension, and no permission prompt. You open the page, leave the tab sitting there, and it watches the drive...
